converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Arthur Bohnen papers
Bohnen, Arthur, 1901-1978.
3195
9.2 cubic feet. 9.2 cubic feet.
1918-1977,-1962-1972 (bulk) Reports, speeches, job files, articles, publications, and a transcript of an interview. Reports, speeches, job files, articles, and publications of Arthur Bohnen, concerning city and regional planning, housing, and urban renewal. Also, transcript of interview of Otar Aamodt, by Bohnen, 1977. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 1 ======= 1 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2067407
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Martin Heggestad
Date completed:
August 2004
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, August 2004
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Member, International Fraternity of Lambda Alpha, Ely Chapter.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Reports, speeches, job files, articles, and publications of Arthur Bohnen, concerning city and regional planning, housing, and urban renewal. Also, transcript of interview of Otar Aamodt, by Bohnen, 1977.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Reports (including feasability, rental market, and land demand studies)Boxes 1-2
Series II. Volunteer work for the International Executive Service CorpsBox 3
Series III. Publications by Bohnen and relating to his workBoxes 3-4, 8
Series IV. Subject files (speeches, clippings, notes)Boxes 4-5
Series V. Job filesBoxes 5-7
Series VI. Lambda Alpha InternationalBoxes 7-8
Series VII. BlueprintsBoxes 9-10
Cite As:
Arthur Bohnen papers, #3195. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Urban renewal. Regional planning. City planning. Housing. Aamodt, Otar. Lambda Alpha International. Ely Chapter
